About Ninearc

Built for brands that
mean business

At Ninearc, we specialize in branding services that transform brands into memorable experiences. From digital marketing to brand strategy that propels your business forward, our agency helps companies scale with clarity, creativity, and strategy.

Whether you're a startup, SMB, or an established corporation, Ninearc ensures you show up powerfully in every space you occupy through effective marketing. Let's build what's next.

Meet the Team Our Services
01

Our Mission

To empower brands through innovative marketing, creative content, and strategic communication that enhance connection, visibility, and sustainable growth.

02

Our Vision

To become a global leader in integrated marketing where every business has access to world-class storytelling and opportunities to scale.

03

Our Promise

Transparent communication, measurable results, and creative work we're proud to put our name on. Every project, every time.

We are Ninearc

A Canadian digital marketing and branding agency built on the belief that every brand deserves a powerful, consistent presence across every channel.

Our Story

Built for brands that
mean business

Ninearc Agency was founded with a single belief: that world-class marketing shouldn't be reserved for billion-dollar companies. Every business deserves a brand and marketing strategy that commands attention.

We started in Canada and have grown into a full-service integrated agency handling everything from social media and brand identity to experiential marketing and web development. Our clients trust us because we treat their business like our own.

The name "Ninearc" reflects our philosophy — multiple disciplines, one arc of growth. Everything we do is connected, intentional, and built to compound over time.

Work With Us →

Our Values

What drives everything
we do

01

Clarity

We cut through the noise. Every strategy, campaign, and deliverable is clear, purposeful, and aligned to your goals — no fluff, no filler.

02

Creativity

We believe the most powerful marketing is rooted in genuine creative thinking. We bring fresh ideas to every brief, every time.

03

Commitment

We treat your business like our own. That means honest conversations, consistent effort, and results that actually move the needle.

04

Connection

Great marketing builds real connections between your brand and your audience. We obsess over every touchpoint.

What we do

Nine integrated disciplines, one goal: make your brand impossible to ignore in Canada's competitive digital landscape.

Our Services

Everything your brand
needs to grow

01

Social Media Marketing

We manage your social media marketing efforts end-to-end — leveraging content creation, scheduling posts, engaging with your audience, and monitoring performance. Our team ensures your brand shows up consistently and professionally, driving real results.

From Instagram to TikTok to LinkedIn, we help you build a strong digital presence that converts followers into customers.

Content StrategyPost SchedulingCommunity ManagementAnalytics & ReportingInfluencer Collaboration
02

Digital Marketing

We build custom strategies rooted in data, creativity, and market insight. From funnel design to competitive analysis and customer journey mapping, we incorporate content creation, email marketing, graphic design, SEO, and social media marketing.

This comprehensive approach provides a clear roadmap to help your brand grow efficiently and sustainably across all digital channels.

Funnel DesignCompetitive AnalysisCustomer Journey MappingMulti-Channel StrategyGrowth Roadmap
03

Content Creation

Your content should look as good as your brand feels. We specialize in high-quality photos, videos, Reels, TikToks, and graphic design tailored to your audience and industry.

Every piece is thoughtfully curated to enhance engagement, strengthen brand identity, and effectively tell your story — optimized for social media and search performance.

Photography DirectionVideo ProductionReels & TikToksGraphic DesignBrand Storytelling
04

Graphic Designing

We create visuals that enhance your brand's identity and messaging with clarity and visual appeal. Our offerings include promotional graphics, social media layouts, menus, posters, and digital assets — all tailored for effective content creation and marketing campaigns.

Each design is customized to reflect your brand's personality and ensure consistency across all platforms.

Promotional GraphicsSocial Media LayoutsPosters & MenusDigital AssetsBrand Consistency
05

Email Marketing

We create and manage email campaigns that nurture your audience and drive meaningful action. From newsletters to promotional blasts and automated workflows — our process includes writing, graphic design, and optimization to increase engagement, build relationships, and boost conversions.

Newsletter CampaignsPromotional BlastsAutomated WorkflowsCopywritingPerformance Optimization
06

Search Engine Optimization

We help your business get found by the right audience. Through strategic keyword targeting, on-page optimization, and technical improvements, we enhance your search rankings while driving organic traffic that converts.

Our SEO-focused content creation, combined with social media strategies, boosts your visibility and ensures your brand stands out in competitive search results.

Keyword ResearchOn-Page OptimizationTechnical SEOOrganic Traffic GrowthSearch Rankings
07

Event Marketing

We plan, promote, and execute events that create lasting impressions. Whether it's a product launch, concert, corporate event, or community gathering — we handle the full marketing lifecycle from pre-event buzz to post-event content amplification.

Event StrategyPromotion CampaignsOn-site ExecutionContent CapturePost-Event Amplification
08

Web & App Development

We design and build high-performance websites and mobile applications that are fast, scalable, and built to convert. From brand new builds to full redesigns, our development team creates digital experiences that reflect your brand identity and drive measurable results.

Whether you need a sleek marketing site, a feature-rich e-commerce platform, or a custom mobile app for iOS and Android — we handle every stage from wireframe and UX design through to launch and ongoing support.

Website Design & DevelopmentMobile App DevelopmentE-CommerceUX/UI DesignMaintenance & Support
09

Experiential Marketing

We create immersive, social-first brand experiences that connect businesses directly with real consumers. Through live product testing, public reactions, creator-led storytelling, and street-style activations, Ninearc helps brands generate authentic engagement, viral-ready content, and valuable consumer insights.

Our experiential campaigns are designed to do more than create buzz — they build trust, increase visibility, and turn real-world interactions into high-performing digital assets across social media platforms. From product launches and sampling campaigns to branded activations and live audience engagement, we help brands create moments people remember and share.

Public Product TestingLive Consumer ReactionsStreet-Style Brand ActivationsUGC & Viral Content CreationConsumer Insights & FeedbackCreator-Led Campaigns

With Purpose

We design and execute meaningful events that elevate your brand and create lasting impressions — from B2B networking to concerts and exclusive executive gatherings.

What We Offer

Which event should
you attend?

01

Unity in
Business

Stay Tuned
B2B Networking

We curate purpose-driven B2B events designed to help small and medium-sized businesses connect, collaborate, and grow. From networking meetups to industry-focused gatherings, our events create spaces where entrepreneurs and professionals build meaningful relationships, exchange ideas, and discover new opportunities.

We incorporate live entertainment and brand activation into our corporate events to enhance the overall experience and leave a lasting impression on every attendee.

Networking Meetups Industry Gatherings Brand Activation Live Entertainment SMB Focused
02

Concerts &
Live Entertainment

Stay Tuned
Live Events

We produce dynamic concert experiences that bring music, culture, and community to life — perfect for brand activation and community engagement. From artist bookings to stage production, marketing, logistics, and crowd experience, we manage every creative and operational detail.

Whether it's an intimate showcase or a large-scale performance, we deliver high-energy events that leave audiences inspired and create lasting brand impact.

Artist Bookings Stage Production Event Marketing Logistics & Operations Crowd Experience
03

The Executive
Experience

Request Access
By Invitation Only

Premium, high-level corporate events crafted exclusively for established entrepreneurs and founders. Designed with intention and sophistication, each gathering offers private networking opportunities, business insight sessions, and curated experiences that foster high-value conversations among North America's leading C-suite executives and founders.

Every detail is elevated — from the venue at our very own speakeasy, recognized by Preferred Magazine as Toronto's most compelling private space, to the guest experience itself. An unforgettable, elite-level atmosphere complemented by live entertainment.

Fintech · Branding & Social Media

Musaffa
Halal Fintech Platform

Client
Musaffa
Category
Fintech · Branding & Social Media
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Musaffa is the world's first trusted Halal trading platform, dedicated to helping ethically conscious investors screen stocks and ETFs for Shariah compliance. Ninearc was engaged to establish Musaffa as a recognised brand in the halal investing space and build awareness among a growing community of Muslim investors across Canada and beyond.

The Challenge

The challenge was to create a strong brand identity while educating users on Halal trading and positioning Musaffa simultaneously as both a trusted resource and a community hub. The messaging had to be accessible to everyday investors while meeting the standards of ethically conscious, religiously observant audiences.

Our Approach

Ninearc developed a comprehensive branding strategy including logo design, color palette, and brand guidelines to reflect transparency, trust, and innovation. We executed a multi-platform social media campaign, creating engaging content about Halal investing and financial education. A key component was launching the Musaffa Channel — where the Musaffa team shares market insights, trending stocks, and investment tips, directly connecting with and growing their audience.

Campaign Video

Results

The campaign successfully increased brand awareness and online engagement, established Musaffa as the go-to platform for ethical investing, and cultivated a growing community of informed users. The Musaffa Channel became a key resource for audiences seeking guidance on Halal trading and investment trends.

3×
Social Growth
↑85%
Engagement Rate
40+
Pieces/Month
↑60%
Platform Signups

"Ninearc consistently comes across as smart, well-rounded, and eager to take on new challenges. They bring a lot of entrepreneurial ideas to the table and have proven to be reliable and dependable."

— Musaffa Team

Deliverables

  • Brand Voice & Messaging Guide
  • Social Media Strategy
  • Monthly Content Calendar
  • Instagram Content (Feed + Stories)
  • LinkedIn Content Strategy
  • TikTok Content Production
  • Community Management
  • Monthly Performance Reports

Event Marketing & Campaign

Talwiinder
Concert Tour Marketing

Client
Talwiinder
Category
Event Marketing & Campaign
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Ninearc spearheaded the full-scale planning and execution of the Talwiinder Concert in Toronto, managing every aspect from venue selection and logistics to audience engagement and full marketing execution.

The Challenge

The challenge was creating a campaign that would resonate with diverse audiences across Canada while maximising ticket sales and building Talwiinder's brand in the Canadian market — all within a tight promotional window and with the need to generate genuine cultural momentum.

Our Approach

Our team developed a comprehensive marketing campaign across social media, email, and local advertising channels, creating a buzz that reached diverse audiences and amplified ticket sales. We designed content that highlighted the artist's brand, shared behind-the-scenes moments, and leveraged targeted promotions to maximise visibility. Ninearc's integrated approach ensured seamless event operations, high engagement, and measurable impact.

Event Highlights Video

Results

Through these efforts, the concert attracted 5,000+ attendees, delivering a memorable live experience while strengthening Talwiinder's presence in the Canadian market.

100%
Shows Sold Out
↑200%
Social Reach
5+
Cities Covered
↑150%
Follower Growth

Deliverables

  • Tour Marketing Strategy
  • Multi-City Paid Social Campaigns
  • Social Media Management
  • Promotional Content Production
  • On-Site Event Coverage
  • Post-Tour Content Package
  • Audience Growth Strategy

Construction · Branding & Social

Haswani Construction
Brand Identity & Social Media

Client
Haswani Construction
Category
Construction · Branding & Social
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Haswani Construction Group is a trusted, innovative leader in the construction and infrastructure industry. Ninearc was engaged to strengthen their brand identity and digital presence, positioning them as a credible partner for high-quality construction projects while engaging clients, partners, and stakeholders online.

The Challenge

The construction industry is competitive and trust-driven. Haswani needed a modern, professional brand presence that communicated their expertise and reliability — both visually and through their content — to win higher-value commercial and residential contracts.

Our Approach

Ninearc created a professional and modern visual identity, including logo refinement, colour palette, and brand guidelines reflecting the company's expertise and reliability. We executed a targeted social media campaign showcasing completed projects, behind-the-scenes insights, and thought leadership content — designed to highlight Haswani's capabilities and establish credibility within the industry.

Brand Campaign Video

Results

The campaign enhanced brand recognition, increased engagement across social platforms, and communicated Haswani's professionalism and expertise to a wider audience. The integrated branding and social media efforts positioned Haswani Construction Group as a go-to partner for high-quality construction projects.

↑120%
Inquiries
↑90%
Engagement
New
Brand Identity
↑75%
Pipeline Value

Deliverables

  • Complete Brand Identity System
  • Logo & Visual Guidelines
  • Social Media Strategy
  • Instagram & Facebook Management
  • Project Photography Direction
  • Monthly Content Production
  • Client Testimonial Campaigns
